docs: Initializes the oracle contract with controller, governance accounts, and the
Bittensor subnet netuid whose registered neurons are authorized to submit prices.
constructors.label: new

docs: Emitted when oracle governance is transferred to a new account.
events.label: OracleGovernanceUpdated

docs: Emitted when the maximum allowed price deviation is changed.
events.label: MaxPriceDeviationUpdated

docs: Emitted when the minimum required submitter stake is changed.
events.label: MinSubmitterStakeUpdated

docs: Emitted when the governing subnet netuid is updated.
events.label: NetuidUpdated

docs: Emitted when a reporter submits (or replaces) a price for the current round.
events.label: PriceSubmitted

docs: Emitted when a round is committed and a new latest price is recorded.
events.label: RoundCommitted

docs: Emitted when the validator account is set or cleared.
events.label: ValidatorUpdated

docs: Submits or replaces the caller's price for the current round. The caller (coldkey)
must supply metadata containing the hotkey of a neuron registered in the governing
subnet. Authorization is verified via the chain extension.
messages.label: submit_price

docs: Commits the current round using the median submission price or an optional validator override.
messages.label: commit_round

docs: Commits the current round with a governance-supplied price, bypassing quorum and deviation checks.
messages.label: commit_round_governance

docs: Updates the governing subnet netuid. Only governance may call this.
messages.label: set_netuid

docs: Updates the minimum subnet alpha stake required to submit a price. Governance-only.
messages.label: set_min_submitter_stake

docs: Sets or clears the validator account allowed to commit rounds.
messages.label: set_validator

docs: Updates the maximum allowed deviation between consecutive committed prices.
messages.label: set_max_price_deviation

docs: Transfers oracle governance control to a new account.
messages.label: update_governance

docs: Returns the most recently committed oracle price, if any.
messages.label: get_latest_price

docs: Returns the committed price data for a specific round, if it exists.
messages.label: get_round_price

docs: Returns the number of committed rounds available in price history.
messages.label: get_price_history_count

docs: Returns a paginated history of committed round prices, newest first.
messages.label: get_price_history

docs: Returns all stored submissions for the given round in submission order.
messages.label: get_round_submissions

docs: Returns the current round summary, including reporter count and median when available.
messages.label: get_current_round_summary

docs: Returns the controller account ID.
messages.label: controller

docs: Returns the governance account ID.
messages.label: governance

docs: Returns the validator account ID, if one is configured.
messages.label: validator

docs: Returns the current open round ID.
messages.label: current_round_id

docs: Returns the maximum number of unique submissions allowed in a round.
messages.label: max_round_submissions

docs: Returns the maximum allowed deviation between consecutive committed prices.
messages.label: max_price_deviation

docs: Returns the governing subnet netuid.
messages.label: get_netuid

docs: Returns the minimum subnet alpha stake required to submit a price.
messages.label: min_submitter_stake
